chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D – 5814 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For hearing of CMA No. 24341 of 2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 12-12-2025 Mr. Amjad Hayat, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, D.A.G. ********** The grievance of the petitioner is that despite O.N.O. being in favour of the petitioner, the Customs is not releasing the goods, which are incurring demurrage charges at port. Mr. Tahseen Hyder Abbasi, advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.2 and states that the Customs has filed an appeal against said O.N.O before the Customs Appellate Tribunal. Be that as it may, since the Tribunal has not stayed the goods and further detention of the goods is contrary to CGO No.2/2024, the petition is allowed by directing the respondent No.2 to release the petitioner’s goods in accordance with law without prejudice to recovery under section 202 of the Customs Act in the event the Customs eventually prevails. JUDGE JUDGE SAJID
